title: Integration Package Manifest
description: Schema for CopilotKit Showcase integration package manifests

logo.description: Path to logo SVG relative to package root

partner_docs.description: Link to partner's own CopilotKit documentation

repo.description: Link to source code in the monorepo

copilotkit_version.description: CopilotKit SDK version this package is built against

deployed.description: Whether the backend is deployed and live. Stack nav and demo links only activate when true.

sort_order.description: Sort order for display ranking (lower = higher priority)

animated_preview_url.description: Path to an animated preview (gif/video) shown on the landing page when no live mini-demo is available

features.description: List of supported feature IDs from the feature registry

id.description: References a feature ID from the registry

description.description: One-line description of what this demo shows

tags.description: Freeform tags for search and filtering

route.description: Route within the package (e.g. /demos/agentic-chat). Omit for informational demos that expose `command` instead.

command.description: Copy-pasteable shell command (e.g. npx degit ...). When present and `route` is omitted, the shell renders an informational cell with a copy button instead of Demo/Code links.

animated_preview_url.description: URL to animated preview for this specific demo

backend_files.description: DEPRECATED. Use `highlight` to pin core files (and drive backend scoping). Will be removed.

highlight.description: Core files to visually highlight in /code. Paths are relative to the package root (e.g. 'src/app/demos/agentic-chat/page.tsx', 'src/agents/sample_agent.py'). Files outside the demo folder (typically backend agent files) are included in the bundle for this demo when listed here.

demos.description: Runnable demos (subset of features with working implementations)

generative_ui.description: Generative UI patterns supported by this integration

interaction_modalities.description: UI interaction modalities supported by this integration

name.description: Display name of the managed platform

managed_platform.description: Managed platform details if this integration is hosted on a managed service

path.description: Relative path from repo root to the starter example directory

description.description: One-line description of what the starter demonstrates

github_url.description: GitHub URL to the starter directory for Clone/Fork

demo_url.description: URL of the deployed starter app for live demo iframe

clone_command.description: Shell command to clone the starter (e.g. npx degit ...)
